meta.title: Terms of Service — kalandra.tech
meta.description: Terms of service for kalandra.tech — rules and conditions for using our website.

heading: Terms of Service
intro: By accessing and using kalandra.tech ("the website"), you agree to be bound by these terms of service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the website.

sections.title: Acceptable Use
sections.content: When using the website, you agree not to:
items: Submit false, misleading, or spam content
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the website or its systems
Use the website for any unlawful or prohibited purpose
Interfere with or disrupt the website's functionality or infrastructure
Scrape, harvest, or collect data from the website without permission

sections.title: Account Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our discretion if you violate these terms or engage in behavior that is harmful to the website or other users.

sections.title: Data Permanence
sections.content: This platform is designed for submitting and discussing job offers. Job offers — including the contact information attached to them — and comments are retained permanently as business records and cannot be deleted. You may request deletion of your account and profile picture by contacting us. Please review our Privacy Policy for full details.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us at pavel@kalandra.tech.
